overall.description: A futuristic urban driving sequence through a covered multi-lane roadway with a distinctive geometric glass ceiling. The camera tilts upward to reveal a holographic koi fish swimming in the sky between towering skyscrapers, then returns to forward driving through an enclosed tunnel section. High-quality game engine rendering with cinematic cyberpunk-inspired aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a forward drive through a futuristic covered urban roadway. The distinctive geometric glass ceiling structure dominates overhead, with towering glass skyscrapers visible on both sides. Vertical gardens line the road, and moderate traffic flows in both directions. A holographic koi fish projection appears swimming through the air on the right side as the vehicle approaches the open section.

scene_state.functional_zone: view looking straight up through geometric glass ceiling at open sky

events.description: camera tilts upward 90 degrees to face the sky through the geometric ceiling structure
holographic koi fish swims from right to left across the sky view between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: vehicle stopped or moving slowly while camera tilts up to observe the sky and holographic display

entered.detail: clear blue sky with scattered white clouds visible through the glass structure
small distant flying cars or drones visible high in the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward to frame the sky through the geometric glass ceiling structure. The holographic koi fish swims gracefully across the blue sky between the towering skyscrapers, which now frame the view on both sides. Small flying vehicles are visible in the distant sky. The roadway and guardrails are no longer visible as the camera focuses entirely on the overhead view.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel with linear artificial lighting

events.description: camera tilts back down to forward driving position
entering fully enclosed tunnel section with solid ceiling and artificial linear lighting

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the enclosed tunnel section, overtaking other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: solid metal ceiling replacing the glass structure, with embedded lighting
long horizontal fluorescent light strips running along the tunnel ceiling
multi-lane road continuing into the enclosed tunnel section
black metal railings along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts back down to forward driving position as the vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel section. The geometric glass ceiling and sky are replaced by a solid metal ceiling with linear artificial lighting. The vehicle accelerates through the tunnel, overtaking other cars on the multi-lane roadway. The environment shifts from natural mixed lighting to fully artificial illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from an open-air glass canopy to a fully enclosed artificial tunnel. It begins by gliding along a multi-lane roadway lined with vertical gardens and skyscrapers, where a holographic koi fish emerges and swims through the air. As the vehicle progresses, the camera tilts dramatically upward to track the koi across a bright blue sky framed by towering buildings and distant flying vehicles. The view then shifts back down to the road as the vehicle enters a tunnel, replacing the geometric glass ceiling and natural light with a solid metal structure and linear artificial illumination. Finally, the camera accelerates forward through the enclosed space, overtaking other cars under the glow of the tunnel's synthetic lighting.
